case_title: HONG, HUNG SO VS KRAVETSKIY, SIME D.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,870.88 FILED BY HONG, HUNG SO AS TO DEFENDANT KRAVETSKIY, SIME D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HONG, HUNG SO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRAVETSKIY, SIME D. $885.44 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $965.44, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1,770.88, AND ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
